case_title: ALEXA INVERSON-CULVER VS. ENKHUILS AMARZAYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-12-2015 CONTINUED TO SEP-23-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 57600954) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF INVERSON-CULVER, ALEXA AS TO DEFENDANT AMARZAYA, ENKHUILS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-19-2015. THE SEP-23-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVERSON-CULVER, ALEXA AS TO DEFENDANT AMARZAYA, ENKHUILS DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-08-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2015

ARBITRATOR ALAN GRAHAM RODIER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-19-2015 THROUGH JAN-17-2016.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100018358)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-14-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. OCT-19-2015 ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
